creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #9)

> Got no NLS warning,and I don't know what it means.

There's no warning, I'm just telling you that you install NLS files unconditionally, hence either you need to remove NLS option or you need to fix the port to make the option work.

> If i remove USES=ssl I got the warning:
> Warning: you need USES=ssl

I have the warning otherwise. Please attach the build log.
